HomePage.heroTitle: Shared trip plans people actually want to follow.
HomePage.heroDescription: Discover popular itineraries, save ideas from other travelers, and keep your own plans ready to share with friends in one place.
HomePage.whatWeDoDescription: Organize routes, budgets, notes, and stay details in one shared trip flow.
HomePage.communityDescription: Browse trips other people love and reuse the structure for your next group plan.
HomePage.shareDescription: Turn your itinerary into something your friends or other travelers can follow.
HomePage.statsDescription: saved trip ideas, route drafts, and community favorites ready to explore.
HomePage.suggestDescription: Browse sample trip cards from travelers whose plans get saved and liked the most.
HomePage.joinEyebrow: Join us to share your trip
HomePage.joinTitle: Sign in and start sharing your own itinerary
HomePage.joinDescription: Keep your trip private while drafting, then publish it when it is ready for your group or the community.
HomePage.loginDescription: Access trip plans, invite links, and your shared itinerary dashboard.
HomePage.signupDescription: Set up your profile once, then start building, saving, and sharing trip plans with other travelers.
HomePage.invalidEmailMessage: Please enter a valid email address.
HomePage.passwordMinMessage: Password must be at least 8 characters.
HomePage.genericAuthError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
HomePage.logoutSuccessMessage: You have been signed out successfully.

MyTrip.title: Plan a trip your group can actually follow
MyTrip.description: Draft the schedule, estimate budget, and keep your travel checklist in one shared workspace.
MyTrip.tripOverviewDescription: Set the essentials before you start adding stops.
MyTrip.notesPlaceholder: What kind of trip are you planning?
MyTrip.itineraryDescription: Add each stop with time, date, and a short note.
MyTrip.daysDescription: Split the trip by day, then manage tasks and stops for each date.
MyTrip.dayDescription: Plan tasks and stops for this day.
MyTrip.dayTaskPlaceholder: Add a task for this day
MyTrip.emptyDayTasks: No tasks for this day yet.
MyTrip.emptyDayStops: No stops for this day yet.
MyTrip.stopNotePlaceholder: Meeting point, booking ref, or reminder
MyTrip.stopImagePlaceholder: Paste an image link for this stop
MyTrip.noStops: No stops yet. Add the first stop for this trip.
MyTrip.checklistDescription: Track prep tasks before the trip starts.
MyTrip.defaultNotes: Easy pace, good food, and enough room for flexible plans.
MyTrip.sampleStopOneNote: Drop bags at the hotel before heading out.
MyTrip.sampleStopTwoNote: Leave early for better light and fewer crowds.

PlanHub.title: Keep your own plans and saved trip ideas in one place
PlanHub.description: Open the plans you are building yourself or revisit the itineraries you saved from other travelers.
PlanHub.filtersDescription: Narrow the list by plan status, destination, or collection source.
PlanHub.contentDescription: Switch between plans you created and plans you saved from the community.
PlanHub.emptyState: No plans match the selected filters yet.

ProfilePage.pageTitle: {displayName}'s travel board, trip feed, and saved plans
ProfilePage.pageDescription: {displayName} keeps drafts, public trip stories, and community-ready itineraries in one social travel dashboard.
ProfilePage.bio: {displayName} loves designing flexible city trips, saving route ideas from friends, and sharing polished plans that other travelers can copy.
ProfilePage.sponsorTitle: Turn every draft into a public travel post
ProfilePage.sponsorDescription: Draft private, publish when ready, and keep reactions, saves, and spin-off copies in one feed.
ProfilePage.plannerTipDescription: Public plans that show budget, mood, and timing clearly tend to get more saves and better comments.
ProfilePage.composerPrompt: What trip update are you sharing today, {displayName}?
ProfilePage.composerSubPrompt: Start a draft, post a route highlight, or turn your saved itinerary into a community update.

UserProfilePage.headline: Social trip planner and route storyteller
UserProfilePage.workDescription: Building digital products, shaping software flows, and turning messy travel ideas into posts that are easy to reuse.
UserProfilePage.educationDescription: Computer engineering background with a habit of documenting trips, routes, and practical planning details.
UserProfilePage.composerSubPrompt: Go live with a trip update, drop a quick route photo, or post a short planning note for friends.
